title: soldanella minima subsp. austriaca
intro: Soldanella minima subsp. austriaca, also known as Austrian soldanella, is a rare and diminutive flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Soldanella minima subsp. austriaca is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in salves or creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
